_meta.purpose: Curated registry of the exact governing documents the rule-fetcher pulls, one entry per fetchable FINRA/SEC/state chunk in data/seed_corpus.json. Each entry may carry a committed local `file` (an official-source PDF/text under data/regulatory_sources/) which the fetcher PREFERS over `url` — so verbatim text loads offline, no proxy needed. `url` is retained as provenance. scripts/fetch-rules.ts loads each unique source once, extracts the section named by extract_hint, and replaces the paraphrased seed chunk_text with verbatim text (verbatim=true). Unreadable sources / hint-not-found are logged and SKIPPED (chunk stays verbatim=false). NEVER fabricate rule text.
_meta.not_in_registry_by_design: STANDARD-1035-loan-boot (IRC/derived), STANDARD-buffered-limited-protection (FFS 326349), FORM-311883-esign-terms (FFS form), FFS-PROC-STUB, CARRIER-STUB — firm/carrier/derived sources with no single public primary URL; upload manually via the Knowledge Library tab.
_meta.local_sources_note: data/regulatory_sources/ holds the operator-supplied official-source package (FINRA rule extracts 01-06, FINRA 2024 Oversight Report 07, SEC Reg BI adopting release 08, TX 28 TAC 11, NAIC #613 16, plus TX framework 09 and NAIC #275 15 for reference). SHA256SUMS.txt records their hashes.
_meta.fetch_policy: Local files: read directly (PDF via pdf2json). Remote URLs: respect robots.txt; rate-limit 1 request / 2s; descriptive User-Agent; log source + status + character count for every load.
